form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 4th in a Grade 4 on April 2 over 324m at this track behind Brailey Banner beaten 4.5 lengths (17.68). Has a strong record from box 1, including two wins. Go close.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.54) in a Grade 3/4, finishing a one length fourth. Has one success and six minors from 11 starts from box 2. Looks a key chance on best form.

formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.54) in a Grade 3/4, finishing a one length fourth. Has one success and six minors from 11 starts from box 2. Looks a key chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching and passing the 250m mark came together.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 2 over 324m at this track behind Brailey Banner beaten 1.75 lengths (17.48) in a Grade 4. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 2 over 324m at this track behind Brailey Banner beaten 1.75 lengths (17.48) in a Grade 4. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by 2 lengths at this track (17.50) beating Despicable Kyro in a Grade 4 on March 19. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by 2 lengths at this track (17.50) beating Despicable Kyro in a Grade 4 on March 19. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at this track and clocking a brilliant 17.44 for the 324m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at this track and clocking a brilliant 17.44 for the 324m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled shortly after the start and galloped awkwardly.
Approaching the 150m mark raced tightly and came together.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 324m at this track in a handy (18.09), beating Dire. Will find this a bit tougher, other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 324m at this track in a handy (18.09), beating Dire. Will find this a bit tougher, other runners look much more appealing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Exiting the back straight, came together.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when seventh (28.17) at Temora at last run and returns here after a 11 months break. Has never been out of the money from three first-up runs. Could pose a serious challenge.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame when seventh (28.17) at Temora at last run and returns here after a 11 months break. Has never been out of the money from three first-up runs. Could pose a serious challenge.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost momentum at the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by a half a length in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking an excellent 17.49 for the 324m trip. This tougher but prefer for a place this time.
